creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229103
v1 (apply via "git am")

A patch-level update with no API/ABI changes, so exp-run shouldn't be necessary. CC @dizzy per removal of the patch added via bug 257623.

See also https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/822 if you don't like massive rebuilds after ABI-compatible updates.
